title: CNBC Daily Open: Markets cheer as Trump and Tehran agree to 2-week ceasefire
summary_full: Markets are rejoicing after President Donald Trump announced a two week cease-fire with Iran and Tehran signaled a reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: Markets are rejoicing after President Donald Trump announced a two week cease-fire with Iran and Tehran signaled a reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: Markets cheer as Trump and Tehran agree to 2-week ceasefire
